seo.title: Alex Chen | Full Stack Engineer
seo.description: Full-stack engineer building performant and elegant web applications.
seo.footerNote: Built with React, Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion

hero.name: Alex Chen
hero.summary: Passionate developer with 3+ years of experience building modern web applications. Based in San Francisco. Comfortable speaking English and German (B1).

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a full-stack engineer who loves turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly solutions. With a strong foundation in modern web technologies and a passion for clean code, I build applications that are both performant and delightful to use.
When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or practicing my German over a cup of coffee.

bullets: Led frontend architecture for a SaaS platform serving 50K+ users.
Built a component library and improved performance by 40%.
Developed end-to-end features for a fintech product.
Implemented real-time data pipelines and responsive dashboards.
Built client websites and internal tools.
Shipped features with React, Node.js, and cloud deployments.

featuredProject.title: CloudDash Analytics
featuredProject.summary: A real-time analytics dashboard for cloud infrastructure monitoring. Built with React, D3.js, and WebSocket for live data streaming. Handles 10K+ data points per second with smooth visualizations.

items.title: DevFlow
items.summary: A developer productivity tool with GitHub integration, task tracking, and automated workflows.

items.title: LinguaChat
items.summary: AI-powered language learning app with real-time conversation practice and progress tracking.

items.title: PixelForge
items.summary: Browser-based image editor with layer support, filters, and collaborative editing features.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Send me a message.
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
